The WEDS Professor is a legendary 3-piece mesh wheel from Japanese manufacturer WEDS (known for WedsSport and other high-quality lines), revered in the JDM and vintage tuner scene since the ’90s and early 2000s. These rare, authentic sets feature a clean, aggressive mesh design with excellent brake clearance, making them a favorite for classics like AE86, 240Z, S30/S130, KE70, Skyline, and even AWD builds (e.g., GTR compatibility with square setups and good backspacing).

Key highlights:

  • Construction: Genuine 3-piece (face, inner/outer barrels) for customizable offsets and repairs — strong, lightweight for the era, with precise Japanese craftsmanship.
  • Popular Specs (varies by set): Often 15×6.5 to 17×8/9, +22 to +35 ET, 5×114.3 PCD, mesh face in silver/polished or classic finishes.
  • Why enthusiasts love them: Iconic retro aggression, great stance potential, solid durability for street/track use, and that unmistakable old-school JDM vibe that turns heads without trying too hard.
  • Condition note: Most available sets are used/vintage (e.g., 2002-era production), professionally refurbished with fresh paint, sandblasting, or powder coating for modern appeal.
